title: Floaty Purpur (Sable Addon)
description: Changes purpur to be floaty like endstone. (Sable Addon)
body:
# Floaty Purpur

Makes purpur like endstone for [Sable](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sable)/[Create Aeronautics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-aeronautics).

This allows for you to turn the end ship into an actual floating ship(even with the obsidian).
You will need to assemble the ship first.

Feel free to use this in your Modpack.

![An enderman infront of two floating purpur blobs connected to the ground with rope in the end](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1645/448/2026-04-23_18-17-39-copy-jpg.jpg)
